name: Dual-Flywheel Soft-Toss
approach: Electric dual-flywheel launcher with variable wheel speed and adjustable chute angle. Gravity-fed ball stack with singulation gate; microcontroller sets RPM to control arc. Internal Li-ion pack powers motors and control; BLE used for drills and tempo selection.

name: Pneumatic Plunger Tosser
approach: Low-pressure air cylinder drives a padded plunger to soft-toss balls along a short guide tube. Onboard compressor with small accumulator; solenoid valve meters shot energy. Rotary magazine indexes balls; Wi-Fi tablet interface sets pressure and cadence.

name: Spring-Arm Cam Pitcher
approach: Cam-driven spring arm flicks balls upward for soft toss. Brushless motor winds cam; mechanical clutch releases at set angle for repeatable trajectory. Hopper with escapement feeds one ball per cycle. LCD + buttons for cadence and angle presets.
